name: KINGDOM ✦ ROLEPLAY
description:
ᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠ✦ ─ ˗ˋ ୨🌒୧ ˊ˗ ─ ✦

⊹ ࣪ ˖ ┈➤ Come up with your own plot.

ᅠ

⊹ King / Queen. ᅠᅠᅠᅠ⊹ Elf.

⊹ Prince / Princess.ᅠ⊹ Dwarf.

⊹ Duke / Duchess.ᅠᅠᅠ⊹ Orc / Goblin.

⊹ Knight.ᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠ ᅠᅠ⊹ Fairy.

⊹ Guest.ᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠ⊹ Sorcerer / ᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠWitch.

⊹ Dragon / Centaur / Mermaid / Minotaur / Harpy.

ᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠ.𖥔 ݁ ˖౨☁️ৎ.𖥔 ݁ ˖

✦ Fog creeps across the cold stone slabs of the courtyard, blurring the outlines of pointed arches and twisted columns. Pale moonlight filters through the pattern of the tower's stained-glass window, drawing ghostly figures on the ground,like forgotten symbols of an ancient spell.⊹ ࣪ ˖

✦ The grey steps of the staircase are riddled with cracks in which soft, damp moss has settled – it glistens in the rare rays of sunlight.⊹ ࣪ ˖

⊹ ࣪ ˖ ┈➤ Warning : there is NO plot in this chat, so let your imagination run wild and come up with something unusual.

⊹ If the bot is writing on your behalf, just write to it ❝DON'T WRITE ON MY BEHALF❞.

⊹ If the bot is calling you He/She and you don't want it to, replace the pronouns with ❝You❞ in his message.

ᅠ ᅠᅠ𐔌 + . 🌧 . ⠀ ⠀ ཐིཋྀ ⠀ ⭒

+ ̊🦇୧・Check out my profile! There might be new characters.

+ ̊❕️୧・Don't copy my bots,Let's respect other people's creativity.

ᅠᅠ ⏝ ☨ ) ͝ ⏝ ༒︎ ⏝ ͝ ) ☨ ⏝ ͝
